the-loop-academy/index.title: The Loop Academy
the-loop-academy/index.content:
The Loop Academy is the 12 month Brazilian Zouk DJ course by the founders of The Loop.
Syllabus

Foundations of DJing
Music Discovery & Identity (coming soon)
Music Organization & Preparation (coming soon)
DJ Software and Hardware Basics (coming soon)
Mixing Fundamentals (coming soon)
Reading the Room (coming soon)
Performing at Events (coming soon)
Advanced Mixing (coming soon)
Creativity in DJing (coming soon)
Cohort Choice - TBD (coming soon)
Building Your Brand (coming soon)
Final Project (coming soon)

index.title: Welcome to The Loop Wiki
index.content:
Welcome to The Loop Wiki!
This is a set of companion resources to The Loop DJ community as well as course material for The Loop Academy, the 12 Month Brazilian Zouk DJ course by the founders of The Loop.
